up to the Total Gift Cards tile for p20 '...the same figure as the total tile up top'

point Delete while p22 names it — hover only, NEVER clicked (disabled with nothing selected, and a write action)

pull clear while the red do-not-click brackets hold through p24

rest under the placeholder while p26 reads what it matches on
point out the Filters control (badge 0) — hover clear of it, never opened here
…and the Search button, used for real in step 11

beside the rows-per-page selector as p33 says 'twenty-five cards to a page' — never clicked
over to the 4,661 last-page button for 'thousands of pages deep' — hover clear, never clicked
up to the dash customer cell while p34 explains it (hover only; rows are links and are never clicked)

step 11: type the worked-example card number (probe-verified live: first row of the July 11 list; the table filters live as typed, matched row on top ~1s after the last key)
step 11: '...and press Search' — genuine Search press; read-only query, filtered result verified live (value + first-row card match)
